name: Soulicer Crystal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>心</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こころ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>を<ruby lang="jp"><rb>凍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>らせるスノークリスタル
desc: Cannot be destroyed by card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Soulicer Crystal" once per turn. If your opponent controls at least 2 more monsters than you do: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects.
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Soulicer Crystal" once per turn. If your opponent controls at least 2 more monsters than you do: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects.
eff: Cannot be destroyed by card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Soulicer Crystal" once per turn. If your opponent controls at least 2 more monsters than you do: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
